generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor in building HVAC system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor in building control systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityData
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor for space utilization monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyData
]

instance HeatingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC heating system actuator for temperature control"
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting control system actuator"
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity measurements from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data for space utilization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric and semantic Building Information Model for building control systems"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDETool
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono IoT middleware for device connectivity and data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin metadata management and synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring
]

instance MDETool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering tool for transforming BIM models into digital twin artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, PredictiveAnalytics
]

instance RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight, AdjustHeating, AdjustLighting
]

instance PredictiveAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for infrastructure health and performance forecasting"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance OperationalOptimization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of operational processes for energy efficiency and cost reduction"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live visualization of building system states for Facility Managers"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted infrastructure health metrics and potential failures"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for optimizing building operational processes"
]

instance AdjustHeating : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of HVAC heating system based on temperature data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustLighting : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control of lighting systems based on occupancy data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BuildingSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized digital twin framework for AECO domain building management"
    base:contains BuildingControlEngineer, FacilityManager, DTEngineer
]

instance BuildingControlEngineer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role responsible for device modeling and deployment"
]

instance FacilityManager : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role performing real-time monitoring and control"
]

instance DTEngineer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role integrating custom services and analytics"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT Framework enables bidirectional communication to transmit control commands from Facility Managers through the digital twin interface to Building Control Systems for real-time monitoring and control."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts, enabling immediate monitoring and control operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for service integration and runtime configuration management, where the DT Framework orchestrates bidirectional data exchange across roles to enable holistic building lifecycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle comprises initial device modeling within BIM environments by Building Control Engineers, followed by Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) based extraction of structured representations and automatic generation of deployable artifacts. Operational phases include real-time data synchronization, interactive visualization for monitoring and control, and evolution through modular extension points enabling integration of custom services by DT Engineers to address changing requirements."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT Framework utilizes Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware for technical connectivity, extracting tenant and device identifiers or endpoint addresses as metadata to support dynamic registration of physical assets."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Nonfunctional requirements (NF_X) address critical aspects of interoperability across heterogeneous systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards and AECO-specific system requirements, utilizing standardized extension points to ensure interoperability with existing protocols and heterogeneous environments, thereby enabling consistent data exchange and compliance with industry specifications."
]
